title: Modular Encyclopedia Knowledge Card AI
sourceTitle: Modular Encyclopedia Knowledge Card AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical modular encyclopedia knowledge card for Samoyed dog, combining field-guide beauty, encyclopedia structure, lifestyle knowledge-card polish, and collectible social infographic clarity. Subject: Samoyed dog is the main visual subject, shown clearly and attractively with a strong hero image, small close-up feature details, and supporting knowledge modules instead of advertising treatment. Scene: Clean light educational card surface with soft colors, rounded information panels, refined small icons, gentle shadows, and a publishable series-ready knowledge-board feel. Composition: Fixed vertical 3:4 modular layout: large title hierarchy for Samoyed dog, dominant hero visual, several local feature callouts, multiple rounded content blocks for profile, temperament, grooming, exercise, suitability, optional score card, Top 5 summary, and dense but breathable spacing. Signature Elements: Hero subject for Samoyed dog, close-up feature details, rounded modular blocks for profile, temperament, grooming, exercise, suitability, refined icons, visual scoring, key-point summary, and organized high-value knowledge density. Style: Premium natural-history plate mixed with modern encyclopedia page and social media knowledge infographic, polished editorial layout, precise iconography, high information density, and refined collectible-card finish. Color Palette: Light clean background, soft harmonious accent colors chosen for the topic, dark readable text, muted module fills, and subtle icon accents without loud commercial colors. Lighting: Soft even presentation light with mild shadows under panels and subject details, keeping the hero image crisp and every module readable. Typography: Clear title hierarchy, concise section labels, short knowledge snippets, visual rating labels, and scannable tags; text should feel like an encyclopedia card, not a sales poster. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
